n: Tutorial: First Steps in the Ettenmoors

steps.t: Travel out of Glân Vraig by the path along the cliffside to the east of Captain-General Tordúr and make your way to Ost Ringdyr.
You have returned to Glân Vraig. Speak with Captain-General Tordúr and let him know that you are prepared to fight in the battle for the Ettenmoors.
